name: Ninjitsu Art of Dancing Leaves
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>忍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>にん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>法</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぽう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> <ruby lang="jp"><rb>落</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>らく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>葉</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>よう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>舞</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>まい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Activate this card by targeting 1 "Ninja" monster or 1 face-down Defense Position monster on the field; Tribute it, and if you do, Special Summon 1 "Ninja" monster from your Deck. When this card leaves the field, send that monster to the GY. You can target 1 "Ninjitsu Art" Continuous Spell/Trap in your Spell & Trap Zone; return it to the hand. You can only use 1 "Ninjitsu Art of Dancing Leaves" effect per turn, and only once that turn.
eff: Activate this card by targeting 1 "Ninja" monster or 1 face-down Defense Position monster on the field; Tribute it, and if you do, Special Summon 1 "Ninja" monster from your Deck. When this card leaves the field, send that monster to the GY. You can target 1 "Ninjitsu Art" Continuous Spell/Trap in your Spell & Trap Zone; return it to the hand. You can only use 1 "Ninjitsu Art of Dancing Leaves" effect per turn, and only once that turn.

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

action: Sends from your field to your Graveyard
Returns from your field to your hand
